name: Error Tracking System — Agent Integration (Package A)
description: Wires the error tracking system into the core IES agents and skills. Package A covers the new rigby-error-analysis skill, shared agent conventions (error reporting protocol, self-correction block format, severity guide), and updates to master, rigby, chief, and chase agent files with error capture protocols, threshold alerting, and agent performance reporting.

files.description: New skill: analyze error log for recurring patterns, compute statistics by category/agent/severity, propose tiered fixes (auto-propose vs data-only), update pattern log. Invoked by Chief (daily count), Quinn (weekly full analysis), on-demand, or on threshold breach.

Adds Error Reporting Protocol section: when agents self-report errors, how explicit corrections are handled, the Self-Corrections block format, and the severity guide. Also adds Slack Notification Protocol for agent output handoff.

Adds Error Capture Protocol section: when to capture, how to capture, threshold alerting logic (3+ same pattern), silent logging behavior. Updates Agent Output Handling to scan for Self-Corrections blocks and log them before delivery.
Adds error analysis to task portfolio (new trigger phrases), adds Error Log and Error Schema to data requirements, adds error pattern → training module handoff trigger to handoff behavior.
Adds Shared Conventions reference to agents/conventions.md for error reporting protocol.
Adds Shared Conventions reference to agents/conventions.md for error reporting protocol.

changelog: New skill: rigby-error-analysis — pattern detection, tiered fix proposals, agent performance reporting, daily/weekly/on-demand invocation modes
New protocol in agents/conventions.md: error reporting (when to report, how to report, Self-Corrections block format, severity guide)
New protocol in agents/conventions.md: Slack notification handoff block format and routing rules
Master now owns error log writes — captures explicit corrections and self-detected errors silently, triggers threshold alerts at 3+ pattern matches
Master Agent Output Handling updated: scans for Self-Corrections blocks, logs each to error-log.json, strips block before delivery
Rigby task portfolio updated with error analysis trigger phrases and error log/schema data requirements
Chief and Chase updated with shared conventions reference for error reporting protocol
